short_blurb: Reliable roofing for Hacienda Heights homes and hillside properties.
local_note: Hacienda Heights is an unincorporated hillside community with many two-story and split-level homes on sloped terrain. Steep-pitch work is our specialty — we use appropriate safety systems and access equipment on every job. The area's proximity to the Puente Hills also places some parcels in elevated fire-risk zones, and we install compliant Class A systems for those properties.

faqs.q: Can you work safely on steep-pitched roofs in Hacienda Heights?
faqs.a: Yes. Our crews are trained and equipped for steep-slope work with OSHA-compliant fall protection on every job. We don't cut corners on safety, which protects both our workers and your property.
